We can’t tell you how important it is to continue this momentum. If we start to lose ground, _we’ll be vulnerable to Republicans’ attacks._
But we can’t let that happen. Here’s what on our plate:
* Re-electing Nevada’s Governor Steve Sisolak
* Defending targeted Congressional incumbents Susie Lee and Steven Horsford
* Holding on to Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto’s BLUE Senate seat
* Supporting Democrats across the state of Nevada

**[And with you as one of our founding May donors, we’ll be able to put up a strong fight. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Gazelka Formally Offers Sell Out - No Never Again Bill
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_13_days_away&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **The Republican Senate Sellout is officially on.** Today, Republican Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka waved the white flag of surrender. His list of demands for a budget deal with Walz DID NOT include the **Never Again Bill**! You see, everything changed 14 months ago when Governor Walz' unilaterally declared that Minnesota was in a state of an emergency. Citing powers incongruent with our Constitution, he locked us in our homes, shut down our businesses and forced everyone to wear masks. Now here we are, well over a year later and Governor Walz wants to make his Emergency Powers permanent. Once he got a taste of tyranny, he won't let us go back to our Constitutional Republic. That means he can shut things down again, force us to continue wearing masks and implement a statewide COVID Vaccine Passport program. **Can you imagine being required to show your personal health records when you go places? Tim Walz sure can!** Peter, your probably like me and have realized that the Democrats are not a friend to liberty anymore. Unfortunately, our Republicans don't often seem much better. Senate Republican Majority Leader Paul Gazelka held a [press conference today](https://www.action4liberty.com/gazelka_senate_republicans_prioritize_health_insurance_bailouts_over_never_again_bill?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_13_days_away&n=2) and listed Senate Republicans' priorities for a budget deal. Missing from that list was the [**Never Again Bill**](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_13_days_away&n=3) \- the one way to truly eliminate Walz' Emergency Powers! **We can't let Republicans sell out on us now! There's only 13 days left of the legislative session and we must force them to fight for us and pass the Never Again bill.** **We MUST increase our phone calls and ad buys IMMEDIATELY. Please help us out.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_13_days_away&n=4 "DONATE NOW!") [DONATE NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_13_days_away&n=5)

I'd say it's amazing that we need to even pressure the Senate Republicans but you know how these politicians operate. They smile in your face while they shove the knife in your back.

The good thing is that we know what politicians care about the most: getting re-elected! And there's no better way to communicate to them that they are in BIG TROUBLE than a bunch of angry voters. That's why we are running these kinds of ads in districts across Minnesota right now.

You see, Gazelka and Senate Republicans need to know there is a political price to pay if they cut Deals With Democrats before the **Never Again Bill** is passed.
We mean business when it comes to Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. Action 4 Liberty has been in the trenches fighting for your liberty against this tyrannical government every day!
But it all comes down to 13 more days in the legislative session. Either Gazelka folds and gives Walz and Metro Democrats a fully funded government. OR...we force Gazelka to STOP making deals until the **Never Again Bill** is passed!

**In Liberty,**
****

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Listen To Freedom Rings Out Now
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-b/) May 4, 2020 **Listen To Freedom Rings With Bill Hagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-r/) The latest episode of Senator Marsha Blackburn's Freedom Rings podcast, featuring Bill Hagerty, is out now. You won't want to miss this conversation between Tennessee's two Senators. Listen as Marsha and Bill talk about how they are working together every day to create new opportunities for Tennessee families, grow our economy and hold Communist China accountable for the threat they pose to America and our allies. **Tune into Freedom Rings wherever you listen to your favorite podcast or by clicking[ HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-y/)** **We Must Support Our Small Businesses** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-j/) This week we celebrate our small businesses for National Small Business Week. In order for these local favorites to thrive, we need to do everything we can to support them. From the impact of severe storms that devastated parts of middle Tennessee to COVID-19 restrictions, our small businesses have worked hard and creatively to stay successful in our communities. Now it's time for us to support them and say thank you for all their work. Join Team Hagerty this week by supporting our small Tennessee businesses and shopping locally. **Over 100 Days Of Putting America Last** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-t/) Last week marked Joe Biden's 100th day in the White House. During that time, we have seen the Biden administration set aside the needs of Americans to push their socialist agenda. Not only did President Biden propose the largest tax hike on the American people in a generation, but outlined how the radical Left plans to implement government control into every aspect of our lives. It's wrong to raise taxes on hard-working families who are trying to provide for their families as we recover from this pandemic. We need strong conservative leaders to stand up to the Left and fight for Tennessee families - and that's exactly what Bill is doing. In the Senate, Bill is working to keep your hard-earned money in your pocket and create new opportunities for Tennesseans to be successful. **It's Past Time To Address The Border Crisis** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-i/) Since Joe Biden took office, there has been an immigration crisis impacting our border communities and the country, yet the radical Left continues to deny this growing humanitarian crisis. It has now been over 40 days since Joe Biden put Kamala Harris in charge of addressing this crisis, and the Vice President has still not made a trip to visit the southern border.By not securing our border, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are failing the American people. The Biden Administration wants to enact weak immigration policies, like dismantling ICE, ending the construction of the southern border wall and releasing illegal migrants who test positive for COVID-19 into American communities - but Bill is fighting back. In the Senate, Bill is standing up for the rule of law and fighting to give our border patrol agents the resources they need to secure our borders and protect our national security. [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-d/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-h/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-k/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-u/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-o/) [ Share ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-n/) [ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-m/) [ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-mhjgdk-l-c) Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215 [Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-mhjgdk-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-q) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-mhjgdk-fuutjhhtj-a/)

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Joe Biden – Robin Hood
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
body:
Peter,
I watched the Democrat Party give Joe Biden
standing ovation after standing ovation as he laid out his plan
to transform America into a socialist nightmare by raising taxes,
defunding the police, increasing our dependence on China, and
ramming through the dangerous "Green New Deal."
He's going to defund the police and tax
corporations into oblivion to pay for his progressive experiment
and make our nation more dependent on his friends in China.
Old Joe is turning himself into Robin Hood
with YOUR MONEY! All of the spending -a total of $6 Trillion so
far this year - is coming from your pocket.
I want to believe that the liberals in
Congress don't understand this - but I have to think it is all
part of their plan.
A plan that I need your help to stop.
In less than 100 days, Joe Biden has worked
to deconstruct America, strip our freedoms, and force us into his
twisted vision of America that was once relegated to the pages of
fiction novels, but is about to become a reality.

He will decide when and where you can
pray, go to work, or for how long you are required to wear a mask
He will decide when your business can
reopen and when your child can go back to school
He will decide how much of your money you
can keep and how much he gets to distribute as he sees fit

If you dare to stand up and question their
plan, you will be silenced. BLM and the media will shout you
down as a racist, Twitter will suspend your account, Amazon will
shut down any website you have.
Joe Biden wants to rescue America but who is
going to rescue us from him? It's up to you and me, and that's
why I'm working so hard to keep America safe from Joe Biden's
liberal agenda
NO MORE. We have to resist.
Fighting for your rights is why I'm here in
Washington, and I won't give up until we put an end to the
socialist takeover of America.
Whether it be fascist, communist, or
socialist leaders, Joe Biden is following in the footsteps of
other dangerous men. He is counting on you being fooled by his
goofy smile and grandfatherly demeanor.
The state-run decision-makers lead by Comrade
Biden have made up their minds.

Oppose them, and you're a racist
Ask them to follow the rules and the
Constitution, you're a racist
Work hard to live the American Dream, and
you're a racist who must pay their "fair share"

As the left and their friends in the media
keep up their attacks on me, Senate Democrats are tripping all
over themselves to break the rules, throw out the filibuster and
trample all over our Constitution to pass an agenda more
progressive than anything FDR proposed.
We have to stand and fight. I'm here doing
my part and I need your help. Are you with me?
For America,

Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri

STAND WITH JOSH

PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
SENATE

Please take a minute to read the special message from our
sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service
free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of USA Freedom Fighters.

subject: This Is Why They Fear Me

body:
When I ran the ad above in my district, the liberals in DC clutched their pearls and headed to their fainting couches. They called me every name in the book because they had no idea how to handle a strong conservative woman.
---
We need adults in Congress – not children who call for race riots in America if a trial doesn’t go the way they want. More confrontational? How about law-abiding?
| | | [](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/hFwpuxdYFY-mwojm8zNQA0tWyRt78vQxXN4efkaCxTcFPJwV7o-AoEeFxeWXySIkCAHvNVvUQHdqwAvFjK7zoxGUVfRXxW2_iaYTRunoUvWxo3kczfJzhWTxgPudNLUrFCuG2-3DZASJYzvXSuE6nxUyyrNLI0MdQNVj_EkYMFYP8AerOXOpVNdZF5ySfkxMkjvX4NIp23CI4Sds7JLh8w) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Greene for Congress.

| [](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/2LifuKh2c45W1TEnzhG0If3HNdQXV5arwvh5fp8xsem46Y0P9d0AWe6SPtoL9ccxs_n8fRbhs0hbw1ChJHnWUeGR92egVcvQbnRN5K2E0QL-UW2Hv63jIYMcG9flfVo6Fjmd8QHyLG6Y26s_BDaGfpmqAS9YErdKU_bI1Kl4dpXKOro_x-vNbap64nzjozVW4-mA_-3e-xMZ-V_53vF-yA "Marjorie Taylor Greene") Fellow Patriot When I ran the ad above in my district, the liberals in DC clutched their pearls and headed to their fainting couches. They called me every name in the book because they had no idea how to handle a strong conservative woman. When I got here, they did everything they could to force me out of office, because they had a plan to take away your rights as an American and they knew I would NEVER let it happen. They failed, and when Joe Biden announced that our God-given rights were an “International Embarrassment,” and he was going to start taking them away, **_I thanked God that I was still here in DC to fight him._** **[I will fight him with everything I have, but I need to know RIGHT NOW who is with me and who isn’t. Will you stand with me against Joe Biden’s Tyranny?](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/5tMk1Ot3xGOezq5wbICvvw8FZbcgdjwbAjO7VqJQC65XiEBwBXhJ6Y28Y41DFBQWsgvU3N_VQ7aj5FqfLlQBBroZ5HUq_e3nixItdrA0J8IRRq3SFsB5LmFWyZqs0ppotPEXcxb0OYY4BO9H0xlmMxgZL2lC6P52opyUmk8F-su7Mjz4SfmZR_sKIXfe-B5lZaHaO0pgpuIl0gNRozi0cg "I will fight him with everything I have, but I need to know RIGHT NOW who is with me and who isn’t. Will you stand with me against Joe Biden’s Tyranny?")** **Every time government leaders told you when you could leave your home, when you could send your children to school, when you could worship, every time they decided when you could and could not work –[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/5ARawi7iWXVegV3wba9CIfUdNZdXEhiQFi3vwS1kSGItYYMUy8NkpjdkQYra4zndX2rzm-BPe936F91pwgRcV3m7UzN6_H9YcWiT-eS26ARxvpQ8wy8o4PeT6UUB5e96iOCtZvX34A5g34xH3ABgIl-HTIshMZUSR_WBwaLBiEYAe_oboRt9ZXgZjxt_WIy3oXEEn8eNHpEoKFUgbKTzMA "Shall NOT Be Infringed")** **ALL OF IT WAS LEADING TO THIS MOMENT.** This was always their goal – to defund the police and to take your right to defend yourself, then nobody could stand up to them. I’m still here and I’m still standing. **[I need you to stand with me.](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/LYenKtWgCwJMO2jrJAKwe51zMzvU9hL2A6Nw0OCQtg3EtY_w_m6SGS5-earLeob_ocRfuTfhKVTMSaiymONb4MPAoL9nXHeTP54oqsxRPRYpMa07FKDzAijodRuTzH4fL4CmDY3ZpNtV41BjwK7L1etaiSup4uWLvqr-pWjxEkJjWN6qONSvNFv0zZ7cO1KlYLx7KKcpBhy0p10PZjHerw "I need you to stand with me.")** They know I am going to be a problem, and they are going to come after me. I need to be able to fight back, to fight for you. **[If you love this nation and refuse to permit the radical left to rule this nation, then I need you to continue to support my efforts in our fight for freedom.](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/h3PI5P8TSxbVHNOcmIqXLBxS1xMAw_7LS-7sXtquuA5DgT6yVvul8Q2Fz74aGz27EYBIbeYnKpv5qoiKbWiBWZ0iihRSMStW1YQdwOYdUJMWMWzBWmkiJefZOyettWzriqvZ1N3zgwOEk9HYgP3bVxTN7ii9wTnEtFKsqcweyMEanpx8t3oLm2VLDzsFRDJvlBAkBxX-oWPC56y3x44itA "If you love this nation and refuse to permit the radical left to rule this nation, then I need you to continue to support my efforts in our fight for freedom.")** Together, we can stop this, but we need to start today, and I need you by my side! God Bless America,
[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/fahNdml3UODurr-Zjw-tSpROFQh9y45qqRjb4Z5bYshwN1qfplsPIMjrhWiu8cSBhFHrNvcbBg_di3rdF73C3tHBoaPuCZcTi63z6hu_8NZVDSTv-VZvBk9uF7GTBtRIIkvQxzKKV2l3kLgvoWgNXZYiXVHb0EOetVtbla2LAiIKv7x-bIOlPoe8mb23g6bO-lPMgOpvZDbZCAc7lEQW3Q "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. name: Rep. Torrey Harris
subject: three-fifths compromise and Bill Lee's Tennessee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEAT BILL LEE, PAC
body:
Peter
It’s Representative Gloria Johnson here and I represent House District 13 in the Tennessee legislature. I’m sure you have seen the headlines, but Bill Lee’s puppets in the legislature are wreaking havoc on our state. Under his leadership, they are passing legislation that harms every day Tennessee families and he is wasting no time in signing this policy into law.
Tennesseans desperately need doctors and hospitals that don’t bankrupt their families, but Gov. Lee does nothing, though it would not cost our state one penny to expand Medicaid. One million students need public schools with resources and highly trained teachers, and Gov. Lee does nothing as we remain 46th in funding in the country. Too many families can’t afford food and rent, and Gov. Lee is bragging about fast low-pay food jobs and cuts to unemployment.
It’s time for a change, Tennessee families need a governor who understands the kitchen table issues they face each day — not an out of touch multimillionaire.
Yesterday, a group of Tennesseans across the state, from all different backgrounds, launched Beat Bill Lee , a PAC to stop the power grab from fringe right wing Bill Lee and the dark money interest groups he represents. But we cannot do this alone.
Are you able to chip in or sign up for a recurring donation? Every cent counts and will go toward replacing Bill Lee with a governor who will work with Tennessee’s legislature to actually improve lives for Tennesseans.
Thank you so much for your support, it’s going to take all of us working together!
-Rep. Gloria Johnson
Make a Donation to Beat Bill Lee! PS- Don't forget to follow us on social media!
https://www.facebook.com/beatbilllee [https://www.facebook.com/beatbilllee] https://twitter.com/beatbilllee [https://twitter.com/beatbilllee] https://www.instagram.com/beatbilllee/ [https://www.instagram.com/beatbilllee/]

subject: We’re making strides in education in Indiana!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Here’s what we accomplished for our teachers and kids in the legislature. Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470442?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-education-1?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_Education1_050521&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=4038b832d8&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republican,

Our Indiana state lawmakers recently wrapped up their legislative session, and we were able to accomplish some great things for our K-12 education system.

Hoosiers are making a historic investment in education, increasing overall school funding by $1.9 BILLION over the next two years.

New recommended starting teacher salaries will be at $40,000, helping recruit and retain more teachers. $600 million will also be made available for schools that direct 45% of tuition support to teacher pay.

Indiana is flourishing under Republican leadership, and it’s wonderful to be able to invest in the education of tomorrow's Hoosier leaders!

If you are proud of what we’re accomplishing in Indiana for our children, families, and entire communities, we need your help to keep going. It is critical that we not rest on our laurels and let the radical left sneak in and bring a blue wave crashing across our state to undo all the good we’ve been able to accomplish.

Please help us keep Indiana RED by chipping in to support commonsense conservatives right now!
KEEP INDIANA RED >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-education-1?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_Education1_050521&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=4038b832d8&mc_eid=UNIQID)

We are so proud to be investing in our education system and in the leaders of tomorrow by supporting candidates who understand what’s important to our families and communities.

For our future,
Team IN GOP

* * *
Peter: We need to reform policing in America. Full Stop. The recent conviction of officer Chauvin for the murder of George Floyd using a blood choke, inconsistent with policing guidelines, underscores this need. That’s why I was proud to introduce Senate Bill 142 in the Pennsylvania Senate which would ban deadly chokeholds like the one Chauvin used to murder George Floyd. I’m also proud to count the PA District Attorneys Association and the PA Fraternal Order of Police as supporters of this policy. However, we need to go further to ensure another George Floyd won’t happen anywhere in the country. [_**That’s why I’m asking my supporters to sign on to this petition calling on the US Senate to pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to take a real step towards creating consistent reform to policing across the country.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28706307/284079142/1653109829?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2E2M2Q1Yy1jNWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAijR_vivxye3qZOCyT0VQr2NrFYCu6umzdQeKXK8fo=&emci=046e7d1e-03ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=8ca63d5c-c5ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=15053672) [SIGN ON >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28706308/284079143/1653109829?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2E2M2Q1Yy1jNWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAijR_vivxye3qZOCyT0VQr2NrFYCu6umzdQeKXK8fo=&emci=046e7d1e-03ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=8ca63d5c-c5ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=15053672) **Bottom line: Chokeholds are not a practice of good policing.** Banning the use of force standards like this is one step we can take to address the issue of police brutality not only in Pennsylvania, That’s why I was proud to introduce Senate Bill 142 in the Pennsylvania Senate which would ban deadly chokeholds like the one Chauvin used to murder George Floyd. I’m also proud to count the PA District Attorneys Association and the PA Fraternal Order of Police as supporters of this policy. However, we need to go further to ensure another George Floyd won’t happen anywhere in the country. Bottom line: Chokeholds are not a practice of good policing. Banning the use of force standards like this is one step we can take to address the issue of police brutality not only in Pennsylvania, but across the U.S. Thank you for your support, Sharif Street Senator Sharif Street has assembled an Exploratory Committee comprised of over 100 leaders from across the Commonwealth representing a diversity of experiences to help him develop a winning policy agenda that'll flip Pennsylvania's Senate seat from red-to-blue! , but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to receive only our most important emails or you can unsubscribe at the link here . = = Sharif is the son of John Street, a hotdog vendor who became Mayor of Philadelphia, and Helen Street-Mosee, a retired school teacher. They raised him and his 3 siblings in North Philadelphia where he now lives with his wife, April. Will you help him make history by = | PAID FOR BY SHARIF STREET FOR PA PO BOX 28729 658 N. 63RD STREET PHILADELPHIA, PA 19151

name: Ron Johnson
subject: My thoughts on the recent smear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Russia, Russia, Russia
Friend,
Last week, the _New York Times, Washington Post, and NBC News_ engaged in what appeared to be an orchestrated effort by the Left to resurrect the Russian collusion narrative to smear Republicans, including me.
The stories came from anonymous sources (of course) and insinuated that in spite of being warned, I had been used by Russia to disseminate disinformation harmful to Joe Biden. Nothing could be further from the truth. I have repeatedly refuted these false accusations, including in a well-documented section of our Senate report on Hunter Biden. I challenge anyone to point out what in our report isn't true and doesn't raise serious concerns. Where is the Russian disinformation they are lying about?
The "new" charge is that the FBI briefed me in August 2020 regarding the threat. Prior to its publication, I told the _Washington Post_ that the FBI briefing was "generalized, useless, and unnecessary" because I was already "fully aware of the dangers of Russian disinformation." But the truth hasn't stopped the media from using their unidentified sources to smear me. Unfortunately, most of the media has simply become the communication shop of the Democrat Party and radical Left.
As I said back in March, there is no doubt that Democrats and the media have targeted me and the Wisconsin U.S. Senate seat. But their non-stop attacks will not deter me. I will continue to work to counter their lies and destructive goals. I know who I am, what I believe, and what I have said. I will not let them discourage me.
To do this, I will need your help. Millions of people read these news outlets and actually believe the left-wing narrative they continually push onto hard-working Americans. Any help you can provide will truly be appreciated. [**Any amount, $10, $25, or even $50 will be used to counter this bias and help keep the Wisconsin U.S. seat in Republican hands.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014oyd9lK3aw0BgKWSEci3WTbm-OKyYO8Owuo7g7AwgU6PTOIY9cB_Z6k9inUIRi3d7CZNtOSCOWy5uW1ikhF8FJo9jlRVvhljceJxaApOsDlCu2VTJVcitreqxhCvxwSJPi00gr4JTfIE9yhIZpC7-tUWCdNCNwe7eUGaJjSHz7YOH4tgbelZvG4n9UsQOGOd9Kef-WmmWYd9fZkL5frfEME5LV_L-3kmBmMDDg7Zqjcs7hWizQ_GX3GmAqHjbsI9eZRo3Athxq25THzhnJPP_WwF-YtyJsElqQibZUODtj4X84hh5m620_PDxQN91BfFFPDvreBz4WyMAv2cB2wnAs2OTNyKjEh_wblW6T2L_i6Kv9HljQmzvrtZePmMdzzFblVxw9OGX5oNfp1SMH7S275GZ1vJIz9ggZsV-ljsjEQ=&c=rCk1abPk6-gfeE0xwBVrd2SYg8y8dkVOULoS1odoq1ZmI7atnRLDpg==&ch=WFjvXdSHIfpuVNMy3fjRP4s_yoSanmTeG_1O7d9y0ovBhzsdaNkULg==)
At the time, I was quite sure the FBI's August 2020 briefing was a set up. I was suspicious the purpose of it was not to help me, but to be used against me at some future date to offer the biased media an opportunity to falsely accuse me of being a tool of Russia despite warnings. Now I know my suspicions were well founded.
[**Can I count on you to chip in $35 right now to help lead the fight against the Left and their media allies?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014oyd9lK3aw0BgKWSEci3WTbm-OKyYO8Owuo7g7AwgU6PTOIY9cB_Z6k9inUIRi3d7CZNtOSCOWy5uW1ikhF8FJo9jlRVvhljceJxaApOsDlCu2VTJVcitreqxhCvxwSJPi00gr4JTfIE9yhIZpC7-tUWCdNCNwe7eUGaJjSHz7YOH4tgbelZvG4n9UsQOGOd9Kef-WmmWYd9fZkL5frfEME5LV_L-3kmBmMDDg7Zqjcs7hWizQ_GX3GmAqHjbsI9eZRo3Athxq25THzhnJPP_WwF-YtyJsElqQibZUODtj4X84hh5m620_PDxQN91BfFFPDvreBz4WyMAv2cB2wnAs2OTNyKjEh_wblW6T2L_i6Kv9HljQmzvrtZePmMdzzFblVxw9OGX5oNfp1SMH7S275GZ1vJIz9ggZsV-ljsjEQ=&c=rCk1abPk6-gfeE0xwBVrd2SYg8y8dkVOULoS1odoq1ZmI7atnRLDpg==&ch=WFjvXdSHIfpuVNMy3fjRP4s_yoSanmTeG_1O7d9y0ovBhzsdaNkULg==)
Thank you,
Ron Johnson

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28707268/284082154/-272948131?refcode=210505-usps-syn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjkxMDRkZi1jOWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwXb0ZAQxxyZGML31oG7IQfdWXPwog3yxbY16ykxCXQ=&emci=5b516eab-c9ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=429104df-c9ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=252045)

Folks, Louis DeJoy’s stranglehold on the United States Postal Service is a threat to our country. Millions of Americans rely on the postal service for medication, packages, documents, mail-in ballots, and more. Yet Trump’s hand-picked Postmaster General, Louis DeJoy, is planning to institute the largest rollback of USPS services in a generation — including decreased post office hours, higher prices, and longer delivery windows. [**I’m introducing the _DeJoy Act_ in the Senate to block these disastrous service cuts and protect the service millions of Americans count on every day. Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of the _DeJoy Act_ :**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28707269/284082155/1618123915?refcode=210505-usps-syn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjkxMDRkZi1jOWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwXb0ZAQxxyZGML31oG7IQfdWXPwog3yxbY16ykxCXQ=&emci=5b516eab-c9ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=429104df-c9ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=252045) | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28707271/284082156/1618123915?refcode=210505-usps-syn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjkxMDRkZi1jOWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwXb0ZAQxxyZGML31oG7IQfdWXPwog3yxbY16ykxCXQ=&emci=5b516eab-c9ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=429104df-c9ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=252045)

This pandemic has shown us how critical the postal service truly is. Over the past year, millions of people have used the mail to avoid shopping in-person, keep in touch with loved ones, and make their voices heard in November’s election without sacrificing their safety.
And on top of it all, hundreds of thousands of American families relied on the USPS for a paycheck in these difficult times.
[**We should be doing everything we can to protect and properly fund the USPS. Instead, Louis DeJoy is doing everything in his power to destroy it. Will you join me in calling to pass the _DeJoy Act_ and block these cuts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28707272/284082157/1618123915?refcode=210505-usps-syn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjkxMDRkZi1jOWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwXb0ZAQxxyZGML31oG7IQfdWXPwog3yxbY16ykxCXQ=&emci=5b516eab-c9ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=429104df-c9ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=252045)

Peter -
For four years, Donald Trump made it his mission to destroy our climate. He rolled back over 100 environmental protections, cut funding to the Environmental Protection Agency, and even denied the science behind climate change.
It was disgusting, unacceptable, and downright dangerous for our planet and our economy. But now President Biden is in charge and he’s wasting no time to make an impact.
**President Biden just unveiled one of the biggest steps in his plan to fight back against climate change: cutting greenhouse gas emissions by AT LEAST 50% in the next 10 years.**
This is a decisive decade to combat climate change. President Biden knows we can’t build a stronger economy and a stronger future for our children without tackling the climate crisis head-on. So he’s taking bold action — this targeted reduction is TWICE as ambitious as the one set during the Obama administration.
After four years of falling behind on climate change, President Biden is racing us to the front of the battle, making us a world leader on climate change.
**[We think this is exactly what our country needs right now. Take our instant poll to show you approve of Biden’s climate agenda>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28709176/284089102/2028107041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjMDBkYThlLWNmYWQtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HWs56Q6DKIc9JtisZs1Uwhtfe1O1834pT8feMg31pgQ=)**
Thanks for your support,
Unite the Country

| | Aspiring white nationalist and former bow-tie enthusiast Tucker Carlson used his top-rated Fox “News” show last night to attack Terry.

The segment was a doozy. Outright lies, coded hate speech -- Tucker’s ridiculous attacks were exactly what you’d expect from Fox News.

Tucker is a buffoon, but here’s why we have to take his attacks seriously:

The radical right-wing establishment is rallying to win Virginia in 2021. We can’t let Fox News’ misinformation machine spread lies about Terry without correcting the record. Virginia’s future is too important.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Team Kilmer
subject: Welcome!
body:
Hi Peter--

Thanks for signing up to join Team Kilmer! We look forward to staying in touch and letting you know about ways to support Derek's efforts to get this economy - and this Congress - back on track.

In the meantime, here are three ways you can make an impact right away:
* [Make a contribution](https://act.myngp.com/Forms/3198946187019356160) to support Derek's campaign efforts and help build this organization from the ground up.
* Tell your friends! Post on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/Elect.Derek.Kilmer/), send emails or texts, whatever works -- please make sure to include a link to www.derekkilmer.com!
* Make sure you're following Derek on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/derekkilmer?lang=en) and [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/Elect.Derek.Kilmer/) to get news, videos, and stories from the campaign trail.

Thanks again for joining the team!

Derek and Team Kilmer

_" Don't agonize, ORGANIZE!"_

[Return to DerekKilmer.com](http://www.derekkilmer.com)
People for Derek Kilmer

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Something you can do to get us off to a strong start in May!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we’ll keep this brief.
[**Will you kick off the week and new month with a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210505-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=555_6688874_ALa-pn&akid=555%2E6688874%2EALa-pn)
Last month, we learned that a Super PAC has pledged to spend $10 million to defeat us in next year’s Arizona Senate race.
So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to get comfortable. National Republicans think this is a seat they can take back in 2022, and the fact that special interest groups are already lining up to defeat us means they are serious.
Mark needs our support to hold this seat so he can keep working for the people of Arizona. And the best way we can do that is by making sure we have the resources to run another strong campaign and win a full six-year term to the Senate.
Your support will go a long way, so please use the link below to make a donation today:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/May-Goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210505-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=555_6688874_ALa-pn&akid=555%2E6688874%2EALa-pn)
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=555%2E6688874%2EALa-pn).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Mark Pukita
subject: MARK PUKITA FOR US SENATE 2022 - Please follow our Facebook Campaign Page! And more ...
body:
Friends:
You’re receiving this message because you entered your email address into the pop-up at the MARK PUKITA FOR US SENATE 2022 campaign website. If you don’t want to be included in future messages like this, please let me know.

I'd like to ask for your support in my quest to go to DC (even if you're not able to volunteer on our campaign).

Deb Datres, who is one of our volunteers and donors, put together a “Call to Action” document that this message is based on. I’ll be using parts of it over the next few weeks. Thank you, Deb!

Here are 2 “asks” I would like you to consider to support me:

1) Social Media - your most powerful weapon - and you are on it constantly. It only takes a few minutes to send out a DM, PM, or text to friends or family. Ask them to pass it on. Ask if they would like to volunteer ... it's easy, pop the address "[www.pukitaforsenate2022.com](http://www.pukitaforsenate2022.com/)" or “Mark4Ohio.com” in your text. Can you ask them (if they can't volunteer), will they donate to a man who will fight for their values and for Ohio?

2) Facebook ESPECIALLY – PLEASE be sure you are following our campaign page on Facebook, and ask everyone you know to follow the campaign’s FB page:

<https://www.facebook.com/Mark4Ohio>

Facebook is still the #1 social media platform for political candidates. This is VERY critical.

If you'd like to volunteer, please email Bob Nicholson, our Volunteer Coordinator, and ask him to add you to our volunteer team. Bob’s email is:

[bob@pukitaforsenate2022.com](mailto:bob@pukitaforsenate2022.com)

Thank you so much!

Warm regards,

Mark

Mark Pukita
614-499-0599 (c)
Candidate for US Senate • 2022 • Ohio (R)
[https://www.pukitaforsenate2022.com](https://www.pukitaforsenate2022.com/)

body:
Facebook took final steps this morning in conservative censorship and announced its TOTAL BAN on President Donald Trump is upheld!

**BREAKING NEWS: Facebook BANS Trump permanently **

Facebook took final steps this morning in conservative censorship and announced its TOTAL BAN on President Donald Trump is upheld!

[**We need to send a strong message that Conservatives will not stand for this kind of censorship!**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/trumps-social-media-poll/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210505_TY-2.101720_trump-social-media-update_t1061833-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210505_trump-is-cancelled-will-you-stand-against-censorship)

[](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/trumps-social-media-poll/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210505_TY-2.101720_trump-social-media-update_t1061833-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210505_trump-is-cancelled-will-you-stand-against-censorship)

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Biden's Trojan Horse
body:
Biden promised normalcy, but he is trying to restructure nearly every aspect of American society and the economy as part of the progressives' moral [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=95490ec13df544598ad53cc80b705407&_e=QvcZ6XmeBIQtZo-HX4xOr3UkZLUNHY4KpLbXLHxQrvEcPH1KMimMXgyRRaQwNtWNnY0xImPjDAbZQ12adX3StrByX-b_NyI4xs8ekIxJxMAQFYa-M69bJLQ3wMkGmbQawjWYVXu_Yfd2h9-CZQUluS42E95X8jTnX6hGdeFpYLWAl_f-U-04CDuCtSzwkLNWzpA-kBvcWd2qrE0FyF0otqHUCNoncvdLxJbQDowMNYUgUJS-JEafqsaWtLYZcr9H9UWPISa1_SitD73w9IvTgg%3D%3D) | |
---
**Biden’s Trojan Horse**

By Bobby Jindal
|
---
_Biden promised normalcy, but he is trying to restructure nearly every aspect of American society and the economy as part of the progressives' moral crusade._
|
---
Biden’s third run for the White House was successful because of who he is not. He won the primary by not being Bernie Sanders and the general by not being Donald Trump. Rather than focus on his proposals or experience, Biden won the nomination and presidency by making each election a referendum on his opponent. He convinced Democratic primary voters, especially African Americans, that Bernie was too liberal, and he convinced suburban swing voters that Trump was too erratic. Voters embraced the genial veteran lawmaker who promised a [return to normalcy](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=95490ec13df544598ad53cc80b705407&_e=QvcZ6XmeBIQtZo-HX4xOr-Yw4tnNjfCmXkm4l1ZwZbWcIa1NOzfNh_ywfEy35XjD-yejLl6rz4fUKJwpMwcGPzWzrDLxiWLb5hLblSQMRrUD4afyuGLcivzem27pJVp9t9rxMLZNVzZbIsgBFdOXdEGWUqAOk-lT6Hi3_TOQCGsvJU63IbyQ49Ztk9NCMnigNObOUCLo8PDGn6RHPXL71Sukoh5udWfEYN9e0eHkTm6IDVHaHDJFyu5_QdAOiMAAxrO54MrIiTSpJpaB6chzQrtOVpYr5oWEYCo3Fwuzm4NN00LlCYXnowR-GeGXOR_uUf87oNz-saYBNu7gR2HaGg%3D%3D), bipartisanship, and incremental change as he focused on the COVID health crisis and the resulting economic slowdown...

_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=95490ec13df544598ad53cc80b705407&_e=QvcZ6XmeBIQtZo-HX4xOr-Yw4tnNjfCmXkm4l1ZwZbUeyLs5dL1GpSwFXbdL8_LxOXai5BAipI--IaxyT5VANXeNf8SHPwv1YCETwxf8V1XiGHpL8wz4JbIMaA5wWAKUrvbPMRwlcMG7TLHwedcvSXpy-6LdAxCTro8pr-tTrWdjPfd7cMZNRNCaaotZAU-tHgZCzewQ8mEwK6mXtMdJzYkRCTMULZMtdteQjq1egCgunbi9zSEo9GqYz3lQIsfKWZcnreU_m5yenh3JHsWnCvHgwLDszbsWJ7UEuZHlLL24c6t8ZIXP7esFOgjqzxWO)**.
|

As Republicans, we can’t stand by and tolerate this sort of censorship. | | | | | | | | | | Everyone knows that Facebook’s staff and leadership support the Democrats, Peter. Now, they are directly interfering in Republicans’ ability to reach voters. They’re CENSORING President Trump and stripping a world-leader of his ability to use a critical communications and fundraising platform. Today, it’s President Trump. But tomorrow, it could be you. | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Welcome to the team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

One of the reasons I first got started in public service was this: I saw how decisions being made in government were impacting my community, my family, and our economy -- and I knew things could be different.

Now, I am more motivated than ever to work alongside President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris to help get Congress back on track and bring more economic opportunity to more people in more places.

It's been a historic year, to say the least. To build our nation back better and to make progress on the issues we all care about, we'll have to work harder than ever before. I need a grassroots team by my side that is just as committed as I am. I hope I can count on you, Peter.

[**If you 'd like to keep up to date on the important fights happening in D.C., please join our online community as we continue our work putting the American people before politics.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2hG3qCVZOFhu-tk8ZgyEShniBAu_zN3pnjW9IvEXdpA=/rRvvov56rQ-hryPeYt89yXoFsR5kXUJWa1QqEWRfbyQ=)
[JOIN US ON FACEBOOK](https://act.myngp.com/el/2hG3qCVZOFhu-tk8ZgyEShniBAu_zN3pnjW9IvEXdpA=/rRvvov56rQ-hryPeYt89yXoFsR5kXUJWa1QqEWRfbyQ=)
---
[FOLLOW ON TWITTER](https://act.myngp.com/el/2hG3qCVZOFhu-tk8ZgyEShniBAu_zN3pnjW9IvEXdpA=/oQRPQfVk4qZIhRgcZaQHKH6nVoTY4clJHoA2FPRXNs8=)
---

The victories we saw up and down the ticket in the last election were because of grassroots supporters like you. People stepped up to volunteer, talked to their friends and family about what's at stake, put out yard signs, and chipped in to help power our movement to victory.

We made history, but now's not the time to take our foot off the gas. As we move forward together, we need to keep growing our coalition.

Whether it's fighting to help our economy recover, working to crush this virus, defending LGBTQ+ rights, advancing reproductive freedom, expanding affordable health care, addressing racial injustice, or protecting our environment -- we have a lot of ground to cover. It's my goal to keep reforming Congress so it works for the people again. And to make sure the issues we all care about are put front and center.

**If we 're going to confront our nation's challenges, we need to work to find enduring and innovative solutions. Will you join our team? Follow along on [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/2hG3qCVZOFhu-tk8ZgyEShniBAu_zN3pnjW9IvEXdpA=/oQRPQfVk4qZIhRgcZaQHKH6nVoTY4clJHoA2FPRXNs8=) or [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/2hG3qCVZOFhu-tk8ZgyEShniBAu_zN3pnjW9IvEXdpA=/rRvvov56rQ-hryPeYt89yXoFsR5kXUJWa1QqEWRfbyQ=) to stay up to date on our campaign and everything happening in D.C.**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

P.S. Before I sign off, I wanted to take a moment to introduce you to my number one team -- meet my family!

---

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/2hG3qCVZOFhu-tk8ZgyEShniBAu_zN3pnjW9IvEXdpA=/gnCuvcl2fBqgr11pfDTH0eU9PWsls3_Cu89vSmi3O6g=?gpsid=39_115_16545&refcode=em20_201208_pacwa6_engg_gq_cust_wc1_DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_201208_pacwa6_engg_gq_cust_wc1_DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2hG3qCVZOFhu-tk8ZgyEShniBAu_zN3pnjW9IvEXdpA=/LJBzmC54DabFMD0qAVPm7wARLDfqOOhlZLDuCDK99U4=).

name: Josh Hawley
subject: 🚨BREAKING NEWS🚨 Facebook upholds ban on President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
The free speech of everyday Americans has been at the mercy of Facebook and Twitter for far too long! [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=fc2afc00286248daa0c79d1ae60a31b0&_e=aA5Bvx4IKuQo03QVPpCrua3yYDxvaUo_g5LJWJTB-cEml7g03iPEEqtOFv5iUu4JQd-0XdCYaSsdY8zWaf3hCZBe2MPmheScyP9jVn3WTB2I2Q3pOY4jydlQ06NQyxJEDoqQVL6q6AWkxT5dTj8CM6wkZQdiT7g2vmE517TnbYkYiAvK-RftWHs4pXSuzkuV0Q2klEDbpsmCyMmNnCh0fyFPPuaqzGkn_noeipf7nO3WolIDr07I3630S5TszwWX1n_PMPnF3pyRhwCqLq4hQOhFp7YSTGlTLi2S4MZSwMLXwx6rCVkH2Z_ggGrIVMxaoBt6FV1HM1rP8K9uFwTuEJEulGmZ3JFytujaH8PXzTmrGu8A4H1RrpmcxrS0-Pty38AJb-5uX_0zjdanR0HIhA%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Today, Facebook flexed their censorship muscle by upholding their ban on President Trump.

Unfortunately, this decision comes as a surprise to no one— **Facebook operates as the censorship arm of the democrat party. **

But it’s not just President Trump who has suffered under the oppressive thumb of these Silicon Valley digital oligarchs!!

The free speech of everyday Americans has been at the mercy of Facebook and Twitter for far too long!

Some say we should revoke Section 230, which allows these tech giants to regulate free speech, but I think we should take it a step farther — **we must break up big tech! **

Yesterday, I joined Fox and Friends to discuss this critical issue.

_**WATCH THIS FOX AND FRIENDS CLIP **_
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=fc2afc00286248daa0c79d1ae60a31b0&_e=aA5Bvx4IKuQo03QVPpCrua3yYDxvaUo_g5LJWJTB-cEml7g03iPEEqtOFv5iUu4JimU3rW2GXLyZP50S-4GSLgmT95XqDCC_qJFQSAt1Mkyv9Ne-lVqAZ3I6UInHmrKCIvlMeF4KKG2OTxGRwp_1jCnsuNA9MXUnlDUfzSo_v2Ir8x7cD-JvsPDYZDRii_mdelymK0ZdY5xbfrKh5xFl9K_4XqDrX6cWFFwnYRQOk087uhNiVe69pjSiRlewQi-gqsUPimD7DX2JY0kJDFWiuqmJKJgPoJ6M1LbSOI-ajxiFz1HsSWF6k2j111tmJYHyVAUn0o-fZq9Eg_dxWs_bSZD8nHzeqss_wlAKuqMPzeXVXRjbNCYFWJabyp2SFgY_DAX_gxtp3YhtRx4jQL0grw%3D%3D)
I am on the frontlines, but I can’t do it alone. **Will you help fund my crusade against big tech? **
God Bless,
Josh Hawley

clean_body: The free speech of everyday Americans has been at the mercy of Facebook and Twitter for far too long! | | Peter, Today, Facebook flexed their censorship muscle by upholding their ban on President Trump. Unfortunately, this decision comes as a surprise to no one— Facebook operates as the censorship arm of the democrat party. But it’s not just President Trump who has suffered under the oppressive thumb of these Silicon Valley digital oligarchs!! The free speech of everyday Americans has been at the mercy of Facebook and Twitter for far too long! Some say we should revoke Section 230, which allows these tech giants to regulate free speech, but I think we should take it a step farther — we must break up big tech! Yesterday, I joined Fox and Friends to discuss this critical issue. WATCH THIS FOX AND FRIENDS CLIP I am on the frontlines, but I can’t do it alone. Will you help fund my crusade against big tech? God Bless, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Team Sarah
subject: POLL: Should we protect Wisconsin voters from being purged from the rolls?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Right now, about 188,000 registered Wisconsin voters are at risk of being removed from the voter rolls if they don't request that their registration continue. Sarah is committed to protecting the right to vote for every single Wisconsinite, but we want to hear from you: Do you think we should stop Wisconsin voters from being purged from the rolls? **[Take our short, one-question poll now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28714197/284109210/2109351976?gpsid=50_130_18709&ms=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&refcode=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGViYTFhOC1lMGFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pUQ86J6gaV8Tzfpky45YUIBCq6GRbBzDEkKpDmITsEE=&emci=125b0979-c2ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=b4eba1a8-e0ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=18659593)**

Yes
No [SUBMIT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28714198/284109211/2109351976?gpsid=50_130_18709&ms=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&refcode=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGViYTFhOC1lMGFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pUQ86J6gaV8Tzfpky45YUIBCq6GRbBzDEkKpDmITsEE=&emci=125b0979-c2ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=b4eba1a8-e0ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=18659593)
Peter, voting is one of our fundamental rights and we should be working to protect it. Soon Wisconsin voters who haven't voted in the last four years -- for whatever reason -- could be removed from the voter rolls.

We don't think that's how things should be. Regardless of why a voter did not vote in an election -- illness, lack of transportation, etc -- their registration status should remain intact.

**[But we want to know what you think about the issue: should Wisconsin voters remain on the voter rolls regardless of when they last voted? Take our short poll today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28714199/284109212/2109351976?gpsid=50_130_18709&ms=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&refcode=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGViYTFhOC1lMGFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pUQ86J6gaV8Tzfpky45YUIBCq6GRbBzDEkKpDmITsEE=&emci=125b0979-c2ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=b4eba1a8-e0ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=18659593)**

Thank you,

Team Sarah
| Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28714200/284109213/-382700568?gpsid=50_130_18710&refcode=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210505_Voting_adv_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGViYTFhOC1lMGFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pUQ86J6gaV8Tzfpky45YUIBCq6GRbBzDEkKpDmITsEE=)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjdksOgR99LCF6P0qjBiiuBUh4bNa251WbDG6gsJ_5daDSGiMOyUPvaSq77If9axJFZ4nIgKssaXOla7F2tr60D8g-4UujzQdxAiQb3q6cNlGClNDH-sPOyK7M58Oq6kHeeI-4FMdxCFEkmQPHBPgHJVMnECE4LScIxeeu1fqh657H-9TQ8oRw==&c=nH3XMacdz0bKkVUKZ_n-mZFKPSQskIqe1FFxpbYZmDlW2JxY0zFWcQ==&ch=HRQBu7k5t9yGwKq1ScUhdcTzjM_d3DD6nurzHPA18kkQu1xmjOd8OA==&jrc=1)
---
| Peter,
I am one of the few members of Congress brave enough to stand up to my own party when I see it drifting away from the American people.
I warned you about Liz Cheney being a RINO and a swamp monster, and she continues to tear our party apart.
[America-Last Liz](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjdksOgR99LCF6P0qjBiiuBUh4bNa251WbDG6gsJ_5daDSGiMOyUPvaSq77If9axJFZ4nIgKssaXOla7F2tr60D8g-4UujzQdxAiQb3q6cNlGClNDH-sPOyK7M58Oq6kHeeI-4FMdxCFEkmQPHBPgHJVMnECE4LScIxeeu1fqh657H-9TQ8oRw==&c=nH3XMacdz0bKkVUKZ_n-mZFKPSQskIqe1FFxpbYZmDlW2JxY0zFWcQ==&ch=HRQBu7k5t9yGwKq1ScUhdcTzjM_d3DD6nurzHPA18kkQu1xmjOd8OA==&jrc=1) wants us to think she's a "principled conservative," but those of us who have been paying attention know she has been a RINO from the start!

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Republicans are attacking me for protecting voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there -- Georgia is ground zero for our fight to keep the Senate blue, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand:
**FIRST:** Our people-powered movement defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and the Senate for Democrats.
**THEN:** Georgia Republicans started to ram through new voter suppression legislation in a shameful effort to silence voters and prevent Democrats from winning elections. Gov. Kemp (R) signed into law a sweeping voter suppression bill so restrictive that Stacey Abrams calls it "Jim Crow 2.0."
**NOW:** Republicans are launching attack ads against me and my crucial efforts to protect and expand voting rights -- and CNN confirms I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection.
With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell, and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. **I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first ever Black senator and help lead the fight for voting rights -- but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support.**
So please, everyone: [**Will you split a donation of $3 or more between our campaign and Maggie Hassan's so we can work together to fight back against GOP-led voter suppression efforts, keep Georgia blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc821/2a380d31/2657e5d5/f00fe9/867966076/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNV93YXJub2NrX3JvIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4rw?refcode=e20210505_warnock_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

| Peter,

**Based on results of the 2020 Census, Pennsylvania will lose one seat in Congress.**

| |

**[“Center of the universe”: Pennsylvania Democrats brace for midterm battle.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28716562/284116833/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210505-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQyNjBiNC1lYWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qnkibCVO20WAdgb9Hc6ZcrPFTrAXr4sJbbR0R9Q6ZRs=)**

“Vulnerable Pennsylvania Democrat Susan Wild ... narrowly scraped by to win their race last year, but their reelection bid will be even tougher this cycle, Politico reports.”
---
As the state’s congressional map is redrawn, Susan’s already purple district could change and _become even tougher than it is already._

_**[Will you chip in today help Susan stay in Congress - no matter how tough her new district is?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28716563/284116834/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210505-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQyNjBiNC1lYWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qnkibCVO20WAdgb9Hc6ZcrPFTrAXr4sJbbR0R9Q6ZRs=)**_

**The PA Legislature is controlled by Republicans, who WILL try to gerrymander the Congressional districts in their favor.**

GOP efforts will likely make this seat even harder to hold in 2022. Our work to keep Susan in Congress is already underway, but we must double down on our efforts now to be ready to defend Susan’s new district.

name: Tom Tiffany
subject: Thank You
body:
Dear Peter,

Thank you for joining our team! As your Congressman, I will stand up for taxpayers and shrink the size of government.

You can also stay up-to-date on all campaign activities by following our campaign on Twitter!

Sincerely,
Tom Tiffany

name: TX Runoff Election Alert (Team Ellzey)
subject: You’ve got to be kidding me:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
We are falling further behind

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hpJYFN_hgoza75nKquRQf1aB-m4OvHFS4fOgi9lL333VxrHuNribx9EBTq34TX9yfL0M0AWRe4h89hm8mG-5e5SirQSIv4G0lgtPfPQELL7e-8-9PpcDyW9AmA0O5Cpuh7S02dCg6Eqzz5e3B2ggaQIvFlw5fBk05UvfiPRoxfackjLVDJgterPX5so9KyJqMseD4UflEwMbptPqy62oLvusoddSwXciFEiqfKjk6Z5eXzz2_BnMFWrCMgPsvtUZw1j1VxtW95R69DvfXQxvZleMNVzD6wNvugPo-Cnwh-4F1EW4cm7cTlonmgJBXadRjtXI_nJCsZZOuO110T0K-Je2WU5Sv_hcEQURiPjSIO-SQFljQvvyJeV_mVovDM4MyFWskh9O0jrWW55vSYAiX9XWgkP8o_Y0Pqs7xnyNV_FyhNHQDlmzihO0CQ9XJoxv6Zf5THtpqNcRJeNiFIxVQ019wg43XZ4FXohG3dmWw-g=&c=K2eA1VCz2i1KoHRpbdCcRqmoQzz4rolTqzv14kOQ3AlXG2hyPsoGZA==&ch=1vSu_yzt8XoQxC1w9Fh-GmUj0pnizfvoC9ncytzTFs1ezHzxgk7X9A==)

The must-win **Texas Special Election run-off** is coming up -- and we are falling further behind our goals.
We've been crunching the numbers, but there's no other way to slice it... we might not have the resources to compete.

name: Culp for Congress
subject: I won’t let that happen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BSOaun&mc=Jo&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EM7ghdf&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/bf638003-89a3-4644-a23c-0cadacd3b08f.png]

Welcome to the revolution...

Let me ask you a question: if I handed you a magic paintbrush and you could paint the perfect picture of what you believe your Congressman should do in Congress on your behalf, what would that look like? How would they vote? What values would guide their decision-making? Would they put the interests of America and American citizens first in their decision-making? Would they co-operate with Communists and Socialists just so they can claim to be “bi-partisan” or would they protect your interests and the interests of the nation at all times?

I’m a conservative running for Congress against an establishment Republican who has repeatedly voted against the interests of America and all Americans; he even proudly counted himself among the ten Republicans who locked arms with Nancy Pelosi, AOC and the squad, and enemies of our great nation to deny the President of the United States due process as required by the Fifth Amendment of our beautiful Constitution.

I thought to myself, “If he will support violating the President’s Fifth Amendment rights of due process, he’ll definitely support violating the Constitutional rights of individual citizens that live in Washington’s 4thCongressional District.”

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/6e871135-6a32-47de-9f27-abd39439b66f.jpg]

I can’t let that happen. I won’t let that happen. Not on my watch. Not now.

Not ever.

What started as a spark in 2019 turned into a blazing fire of enthusiasm for the cause of Constitutional government in 2020. Out of the chaos that resulted from the 2020 elections, one thing was certain: voters just like you demanded their voices be heard. The time is now to elect Constitutionally minded conservatives who will work to put government back into the box designed for it by the Constitution.

Thank you very much for your support. Together, we’re going to get this done and finally give Washington’s 4thCongressional District the conservative representation they deserve and desire. I need you to share this email, Like and Follow us on Facebook, Follow us on Twitter, Subscribe to our Youtube page, reach out to us about volunteering, and support us financially if you're able. Successfully pushing back against rogue public servants is a team effort and I am honored to work with you to get this done.

With much admiration,

Loren

We need to kick off this campaign with huge financial support to send a message to the fake news media and the establishment DC swamp! We have a huge goal this month and I know I can count on each of you to do what you can financially to fight back!

WILL YOU PLEASE HELP US! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SFLHNK&mc=Jo&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EEo0V4s&]

PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS

Dark Horse Political, 9514 Kale Pl, Diamondhead, MS 39525, United States

You may unsubscribe [https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=BSOaun&mc=Jo&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECHESSS&pt=unsubscribe] or change your contact details [https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=BSOaun&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJjNSvT&pt=change_details] at any time.
Powered by: https://app.getresponse.com/referral.html?x=a62b&c=r4YFQ&u=Q96gS&z=Ez8tQFv&

name: Nancy Mace

body:
That’s why I am taking the chance to check in now - and see where you stand on the major issues as we move forward this year. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=6d11641153f64db282dd03f9e0c8911f&_e=cU1PofWZgGMqPVJML1q53meAS_0UrdEM1f_PsJeZtIh3OOMO_xKABW3AV5RMsyOLLf9RQcd8nd5zI3-vvJmgTPX0cuxkxXs7u5Grhg7Q8R3rR1QIZHk7dBit5GzzJM78FSKNjF4s2b1j-NF_XucY8kiuoWBLhGHNBwEpQV7u3z_id5eE8B_XW-22rWNPouJHDDZiGCMf1wSkKRKwi40k6jxRbgR1FoigIHf79lgvtmKHNySW_PCeWZnYegxEmlHIZfFIhME-O4Co2dKdyAwwG2ga3mb935vTfY8IcxgAzjJlxQ6ioM5cQYf7xx_vzlplmQJoXr4Mvq56C66e8d1Ktt6qjP-0zfKv2vwS0DieMIWrK9lgx-AJmr2ktbIF_qyh4YQgSfiXhuzGAmb2ZmuEDGsTY395PXKivc1ojjz3nh1-UGPuen6K6_Q-2OVywCDrKgKrIz6r2w22kXIPE-h7x-ypIlyX11u6nDNLtgTphc8%3D) Friend, on the campaign trail, President Biden promised to bring unity and optimism back to America. But after 100 days, it's safe to say he's failed at that. Recent polls show his approval ratings are barely over 50% - in the honeymoon period! And it's not hard to guess why. Let's look at his accomplishments so far:
* a new executive order almost every day
* a COVID relief bill without any COVID relief
* an infrastructure bill that looks more like the Green New Deal than a plan for roads and bridges
* Half of our nation is still fighting to get our kids back to school, our business open, and put the COVID lockdowns in the past.

That explains why 53% of voters are unhappy with the direction our nation is headed. That’s why I am taking the chance to check in now - and see where you stand on the major issues as we move forward this year.
Will you take my quick survey to help fill me in? [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=6d11641153f64db282dd03f9e0c8911f&_e=cU1PofWZgGMqPVJML1q53meAS_0UrdEM1f_PsJeZtIh3OOMO_xKABW3AV5RMsyOLLf9RQcd8nd5zI3-vvJmgTPX0cuxkxXs7u5Grhg7Q8R3rR1QIZHk7dBit5GzzJM78FSKNjF4s2b1j-NF_XucY8kiuoWBLhGHNBwEpQV7u3z_id5eE8B_XW-22rWNPouJHDDZiGCMf1wSkKRKwi40k6jxRbgR1FoigIHf79lgvtmKHNySW_PCeWZnYegxEmlHIZfFIhME-O4Co2dKdyAwwG4UT9bh23Lklz_sqwsqq25yg9PKXKT9sBUxU4F1rvEhbL-F0Tq4isuGfELpLAXX9PACjP-YZuDE_xM7lWyQgCE6war_WEXKHP2DTxVqJixOpJLI0RKmO-mxeAljuB5l0aJ1wEgiKbL7cFPzFYM6fA5p3c3uH1w9JY4ZlBg8XlTc7EkXnakJFmKbrVwLR_s22GHd14g6wWo2Omes1sTP8mKU%3D) Don’t worry, Friend. It’ll only take a few minutes! And your feedback would really mean a lot to me. **Please, take the survey at this link and let me know how you’re feeling:[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/survey-148346/](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=6d11641153f64db282dd03f9e0c8911f&_e=cU1PofWZgGMqPVJML1q53meAS_0UrdEM1f_PsJeZtIh3OOMO_xKABW3AV5RMsyOLLf9RQcd8nd5zI3-vvJmgTPX0cuxkxXs7u5Grhg7Q8R3rR1QIZHk7dBit5GzzJM78FSKNjF4s2b1j-NF_XucY8kiuoWBLhGHNBwEpQV7u3z_id5eE8B_XW-22rWNPouJHDDZiGCMf1wSkKRKwi40k6jxRbgR1FoigIHf79lgvtmKHNySW_PCeWZnYegxEmlHIZfFIhME-O4Co2dKdyAwwG7aZNwSBg1U5hT7vTgXlSsJa5FyjjctaZFQA5fvcWvsI0KHXCPsjXehfEl9HoKlUK9gCdYq5zbW8tTBfphVRnuteBANKgEOY-WmbUpZkfhFyv4x5p8pNlm4VfJovn7AletGT5eCYh8uFcX0sHemY30kcEcu8WHCvlCSAhejw-g0056RuzXIe-zFjXbbY4Htx9HN3xqpa4r1WIraZKc9voBQ%3D)** Thanks. I look forward to reading the results. Best, [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=6d11641153f64db282dd03f9e0c8911f&_e=cU1PofWZgGMqPVJML1q53meAS_0UrdEM1f_PsJeZtIh3OOMO_xKABW3AV5RMsyOLLf9RQcd8nd5zI3-vvJmgTPX0cuxkxXs7u5Grhg7Q8R3rR1QIZHk7dBit5GzzJM78FSKNjF4s2b1j-NF_XucY8kiuoWBLhGHNBwEpQV7u3z_id5eE8B_XW-22rWNPouJHDDZiGCMf1wSkKRKwi40k6jxRbgR1FoigIHf79lgvtmKHNySW_PCeWZnYegxEmlHIZfFIhME-O4Co2dKdyAwwG2FWFX-tTi_4SyZVfr681vJMtmbekptL82gWlDnTqVMdmfY77_5ykGo0lpyK601vo2g2ckeNf-52WrARgbdnMJKLlGZjKSmzasP_c9g-d5oaAsQVf1o36mU58zLxpg6wtsiHb0f8NycrW1P2MGimvsNeoEiQXXaYb7DdxIutynoZZ0AUYfCGyKRT5e7632-oTqUz1DHOPUqbhYSgQZxj0A0%3D) Nancy Mace |

clean_body: That’s why I am taking the chance to check in now - and see where you stand on the major issues as we move forward this year. Friend, on the campaign trail, President Biden promised to bring unity and optimism back to America. But after 100 days, it's safe to say he's failed at that. Recent polls show his approval ratings are barely over 50% - in the honeymoon period! And it's not hard to guess why. Let's look at his accomplishments so far: a new executive order almost every day a COVID relief bill without any COVID relief an infrastructure bill that looks more like the Green New Deal than a plan for roads and bridges Half of our nation is still fighting to get our kids back to school, our business open, and put the COVID lockdowns in the past. That explains why 53% of voters are unhappy with the direction our nation is headed. That’s why I am taking the chance to check in now - and see where you stand on the major issues as we move forward this year. Will you take my quick survey to help fill me in? Don’t worry, Friend. It’ll only take a few minutes! And your feedback would really mean a lot to me. Please, take the survey at this link and let me know how you’re feeling: Thanks. I look forward to reading the results. Best, Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=33aa05e1529340729ea6f67cfb87274b&_e=bgtiSOdmPXCTRqioWUg7mq4Jd65Jpy4_bAWeIdgbFxyopDe9wHJ4Vdjv1TAc6MoZWJEbuXAunPH_sWFFgnXINJWVbctl6z381ARv68asobmt9XVeJZd_EMg3ocftrR_zGtLwgB8BzAZ_2291ky3U6j89Q5UVNtyjfmKJ8d10xobSQrwrmOyhmYC0KG240C9BA8cBvvzNKnovBb6_5CvZ8KtBKvXxk9D2La4chxwvE30gCBhSDl_Lynv9Y6GNcWVkq4xlaHcpvfVobevDeNoPJyCOnpsNRB6SmAC1PJf-OCDLJWtJyC7uO0T-W3JHhDxJ) | | Dear Fellow Patriot,

Our hard work is paying off.

Don’t get me wrong, there is a LOT of work to do, but we have successfully forced the Democrats through the legal system to relinquish over 2 million hard copy votes in Arizona!

We are doing everything we can to protect the integrity of the ballot. And I mean everything.

My name is Mark Finchem. **I am the Original “Election Integrity” Conservative, fighting for free and fair elections from Day One!**

_And I am proud to say that I will continue the fight for free and fair elections when I am elected to the Secretary of State of Arizona!_

But I need your help. We are fighting an uphill battle and the establishment does not want me to win.

Let me reiterate that point. _I have been assaulted, smeared, and cancelled by the Radical Left and I KNOW it will only get worse, especially after I have struck this critical blow to the Democrats with the Maricopa County Election Audit!_

This means we have an uphill climb ahead of us. And by uphill I mean Everest.

The ENTIRE Leftist chain of command right now can be attributed to one phrase and one phrase only.

That phrase is ELECTION FRAUD! And I am here to stop it.

I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, member of the Arizona House of Representatives, former firefighter, paramedic, police officer, and business leader.

And the Maricopa County Election Audit PROVES that I am the guy you want defending Election Integrity in Arizona.

_I know how to get it done!_

**[Help me fight for election integrity!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=33aa05e1529340729ea6f67cfb87274b&_e=bgtiSOdmPXCTRqioWUg7mq4Jd65Jpy4_bAWeIdgbFxyopDe9wHJ4Vdjv1TAc6MoZWJEbuXAunPH_sWFFgnXINJWVbctl6z381ARv68asobmGhEA5yikAJwt33HbH1C8UJ9il6WM8GtTvX38k3IHQYBzv8U7HNa0cUQOI_WB8wsObBQTP46_kExjFyYqri2Ah0oVyPyawmmL_bHdkKCgRQ_inpVLbjk0T3OFsUXRam_PBl5TgyQB6hicPWXKULCccy8T4T-3n1PDwsDGenHznF7in7iBbmx7-nnaQl2Afc5xzf8DamNYmy3mDlx-eY9L8)**
---
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=33aa05e1529340729ea6f67cfb87274b&_e=bgtiSOdmPXCTRqioWUg7mq4Jd65Jpy4_bAWeIdgbFxyopDe9wHJ4Vdjv1TAc6MoZWJEbuXAunPH_sWFFgnXINJWVbctl6z381ARv68asobk3S4AZUM0fNpsSnvAXxoHFwJ3PfvCJ3XPTdIPhlI2LtdTQVU9UfJ48gdxSSh6HSk6CcVA_6o7TB9n_n9SrfkM2m5Eu_g53YpnBPlEINjRlVQ9zZsGH1G9GCFOQ739HqZvp0_1HEz4xaCsK8bmqJjtV80ddexbAg1Z0euOhxvfIgBbRlPRSfcjaoEY-dFz90bGdPfVwGmF1rev4I_Q0seMm)

| The LEFT is running scared and they don’t know what to do- All because of the Maricopa County Election Audit I PUSHED FOR!

_They know that fraud will be found, irregularities, mistakes, whatever the Dems want to call it, we will be looking, we will find it, and we will make sure that perpetrators of election fraud are PROSECUTED to the fullest extent of the law!_

They can’t bear to think that this day would come.

But this day is here. The day of RECKONING for the Dems has arrived!

**“This is a ridiculous story that will become very dangerous in the long run.”**

Why would it be dangerous unless it was true? It WOULDN’T!

And let’s talk margin of error.

Biden won Maricopa County by about 45,000 votes, and he won the state by about 10,000.

**If just a few votes are proved to be invalid, Trump WINS!** And then, once we are done with Arizona, our movement will spread like wildfire!

_And this is the “DANGER” the Dems are so afraid of_! They don’t want anyone to find out that Biden’s entire presidency is a SHAM!

This could be the end of the Democrats as we know it, but we have to push hard, and we have to push fast!

And we need money to do it! _We need money to make sure that the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative is elected Secretary of State!_

This is the first battle in a long war. And we know the Democrats have no limits when it comes to their morals!

Friend, extremist Republicans will stop at NOTHING to push their political games and election conspiracies. **Just look what they've done: **
**FIRST,** Arizona voters – led by Latino voters – came together to deliver the White House for Joe Biden and help flip the Senate for Democrats.
**BUT THEN,** far-right GOP extremists like Kelli Ward refused to accept their loss and started pushing a sham election "audit" and 23 voter suppression bills to advance their Trumpist agenda and prevent Democrats from ever winning another election.
**NOW, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to stop these attacks in their tracks and save the future of our state by flipping the governorship blue. **But POLITICO reports that the GOP is planning to spend MILLIONS to defeat us – and I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back and win.
**I'm an Obama administration alum who's running for governor to defeat the GOP extremism that's holding our state hostage and restore the promise of Arizona – and Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight _confirms_ that we can win. But with time running out before our midnight fundraising deadline, we're still falling $2,342 short of what we need to power our campaign to victory. **

Every dollar you give gets us closer!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28719909/284127903/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk55-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmQwYjQ0Yy1mNmFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ef8hRdO_u4Yt1bSJwKA5LxW647s-aFcPzQcpSmNxCA8=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Florida leads the way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
America needs better leadership |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5a085666ea&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cfc96cc32a&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by hard leftist Darren Soto. **

Governor DeSantis is showing the country how to live freely- and how to govern a free people. He isn't accepting the woke leftist garbage that Biden is shoving down everyone's throats.

All of us have been complaining for years about the dictatorial censorship by Big Tech.

These companies are run by far-Left extremists who (like Soviet Russia) think that no one needs free speech, and are arrogant enough to think that censoring politicians- ONLY CONSERVATIVES- is within their power.

They banned President Trump, while he was still President. They have banned countless conservative candidates who dared speak that which the Tech Lords disagreed with.

As Twitter and Facebook became more and more Orwellian, many of us cried out for leadership.

Governor DeSantis obliged.

_The Florida House and Senate voted this week to pass legislation that would prohibit social media companies from banning politicians.

Fines for social media companies that try to ban politicians from their platforms could add up to $250,000 a day for statewide politicians and $25,000 a day for other elected officials, the Sun-Sentinel reported.

The bill, which still allows for politicians to be suspended for two weeks and for individual posts to be taken down if they violate the company’s policies, is now headed to Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis._

Every time they stifle free speech and debate against their political opponents, make it hurt until shareholders change leadership. That is how you protect the rights of Floridians- AND Americans.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b29a541f2c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| I agree with Townhall:

_The woke zealots who run these companies are taking cues from the liberal media and the Democratic Party to censor conservatives. It’s just another day of conservative America facing Goliath._And we need to start getting slingshots ready. __

Every single day, more of our freedoms are getting taken by the woke crazies of the Biden Administration. Communists in Federal government, Communists in Big Tech, Communists teaching our schools.

_Governor DeSantis of Florida is fighting them all- and with incredible efficiency._

**But we need to fix Congress- and elect Congressmen who will put into code, the solutions Gov. DeSantis is installing in Florida.**

Until the Democrats prove they accept the Constitution and protect the lives and property of innocent people, we must fight them with everything we have and in every single day.

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. But this near loss has not put the fear of God into him yet- **so this year I'm back to finish the job!**

I am an America First patriot, I am a Christian, and I will vote with the Constitution. I will roll back the tyranny of Big Government, Big Tech, and Big Teacher Unions.

If you're like me, you value your freedom. If you're like me, you want to fight for it! [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=74e0a79b04&e=afa21b7626)

[Can I count on you for your maximum donation to elect a fighter and a patriot to Congress?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1e9ec1784c&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we need control of Congress. [Help me restore our freedoms and knock down Big Tyranny!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c601ad1ac0&e=afa21b7626)

**_Let's get this done!_**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f7bd4ba5a0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d05d621ace&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1b704893c4&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=4cfef4fa0c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=4cfef4fa0c).
