name: Alex Lasry
subject: I'm running to defeat Ron Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Wisconsinites deserve a Senator who will put them above special interests. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28720600/284129471/10629281?refcode=EM_C_2021INTRO_onboard_AL_12_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA5ZDk3Ny1mOWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rs1RaxjEF1tDsSjqKuKEicS1XxAwqC1URBVC2tKPvGs=) Peter,

My name is Alex Lasry, and I'm running for the US Senate to beat Ron Johnson, show progressive values are good for our economy, and partner with Tammy Baldwin to bring real change to Wisconsin.

Our country has faced three systemic shocks to the system — 9/11, the Great Recession and the COVID-19 pandemic. And yet, our leaders in Washington have failed to address the underlying economic inequalities that are always compounded during a crisis. **We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington -- people with fresh perspectives and records of actually getting things done.**

I've put progressive values into action, buying Wisconsin products, creating good union jobs that everyone can participate in, providing a $15 minimum wage, and fighting for social and economic justice in my role as Senior Vice President of the Milwaukee Bucks. Before that, I was proud to work in the Obama White House on jobs and business outreach and am inspired by that experience to roll up my sleeves and get to work for everyone in Wisconsin.

Instead of trying to improve the lives of working Wisconsinites, Ron Johnson has spent the last decade trying to take away people's healthcare, supporting massive tax cuts for the rich, and throwing his lot in with Donald Trump and far-right conspiracy theorists every time.

That's why I am running against him, and I hope you'll be with me on this journey.

**[If you’re ready to flip this seat blue, join my campaign by chipping in $10 or more today. And check out our announcement video, and share it with your friends, family, and networks:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28720603/284129472/10629281?refcode=EM_C_2021INTRO_onboard_AL_12_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA5ZDk3Ny1mOWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rs1RaxjEF1tDsSjqKuKEicS1XxAwqC1URBVC2tKPvGs=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28720604/284129473/10629281?refcode=EM_C_2021INTRO_onboard_AL_12_NG_N_L3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA5ZDk3Ny1mOWFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rs1RaxjEF1tDsSjqKuKEicS1XxAwqC1URBVC2tKPvGs=) We need a fresh perspective at this moment for our state and for our country. I'm fed up with politicians like Ron Johnson who use public office to put themselves and their corporate donors above what's right for the people. My history of getting things done -- like bringing the DNC Convention to Wisconsin, creating good-paying union jobs, and treating workers the way they deserve to be treated is a powerful contrast to his failed record.

I’ve shown that progressive values are good for business, and I want to implement this same model across Wisconsin and across our country. I brought together the public and private partnership to build Fiserv Forum and the Deer District surrounding the arena. I did it while making sure that people often left out of major construction work -- including women and minorities -- got a chance to expand their skills, and not just get a good union job, but start a career. We didn't just talk about a $15 minimum wage, we delivered -- and we built one of the most environmentally-friendly sports arenas in North America.

This is the approach I'll bring to the U.S. Senate: putting words into action while sticking up for our progressive values. Meanwhile, Ron Johnson has shown time and time again that his agenda goes directly against the interests of Wisconsin families.

When you vote to end health insurance for pre-existing conditions, when you oppose economic relief for families struggling in a pandemic, when you vote to defund Planned Parenthood, when you oppose giving folks a living wage, and when you spend your time going on Fox News to boost Donald Trump's dangerous lies about election fraud, you are not fighting for Wisconsin.

I will beat Ron Johnson by building a coalition of Wisconsinites from all walks of life and all parts of the state. The first step is getting the word out early about my candidacy. clean_body: Wisconsinites deserve a Senator who will put them above special interests. | = Peter, My name is Alex Lasry, and I'm running for the US Senate to beat Ron Johnson, show progressive values are good for our economy, and partner with Tammy Baldwin to bring real change to Wisconsin. Our country has faced three systemic shocks to the system — 9/11, the Great Recession and the COVID-19 pandemic. And yet, our leaders in Washington have failed to address the underlying economic inequalities that are always compounded during a crisis. We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington -- people with fresh perspectives and records of actually getting things done. I've put progressive values into action, buying Wisconsin products, creating good union jobs that everyone can participate in, providing a $15 minimum wage, and fighting for social and economic justice in my role as Senior Vice President of the Milwaukee Bucks. Before that, I was proud to work in the Obama White House on jobs and business outreach and am inspired by that experience to roll up my sleeves and get to work for everyone in Wisconsin. Instead of trying to improve the lives of working Wisconsinites, Ron Johnson has spent the last decade trying to take away people's healthcare, supporting massive tax cuts for the rich, and throwing his lot in with Donald Trump and far-right conspiracy theorists every time. That's why I am running against him, and I hope you'll be with me on this journey. = = We need a fresh perspective at this moment for our state and for our country. I'm fed up with politicians like Ron Johnson who use public office to put themselves and their corporate donors above what's right for the people. My history of getting things done -- like bringing the DNC Convention to Wisconsin, creating good-paying union jobs, and treating workers the way they deserve to be treated is a powerful contrast to his failed record. I’ve shown that progressive values are good for business, and I want to implement this same model across Wisconsin and across our country. I brought together the public and private partnership to build Fiserv Forum and the Deer District surrounding the arena. I did it while making sure that people often left out of major construction work -- including women and minorities -- got a chance to expand their skills, and not just get a good union job, but start a career. We didn't just talk about a $15 minimum wage, we delivered -- and we built one of the most environmentally-friendly sports arenas in North America. This is the approach I'll bring to the U.S. Senate: putting words into action while sticking up for our progressive values. Meanwhile, Ron Johnson has shown time and time again that his agenda goes directly against the interests of Wisconsin families. When you vote to end health insurance for pre-existing conditions, when you oppose economic relief for families struggling in a pandemic, when you vote to defund Planned Parenthood, when you oppose giving folks a living wage, and when you spend your time going on Fox News to boost Donald Trump's dangerous lies about election fraud, you are not fighting for Wisconsin. I will beat Ron Johnson by building a coalition of Wisconsinites from all walks of life and all parts of the state. The first step is getting the word out early about my candidacy. So I encourage you to = and And then, if you're able to, you can really help us defeat Ron Johnson by = Thank you for being a part of this team, \- Alex Lasry Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. name: Jay Jones
subject: My message to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jay Jones for Attorney General
body:
|
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PWnCPLnL9tkt9_3SwZVUWkND-MCzR6WubH4pYMJEzWQ=/EdbmAQ9fLA4vCbc8o0UyBSd46KzTHcxcZNiZa3jxF_A=)
---
Friend -- During tonight's debate, you heard a lot from my opponent about the past. He did what any Democrat would do in his position. He opposed Donald Trump. I say that's the floor, not the ceiling. Then he reluctantly followed while others led the way. This campaign is about the future, not the past. It's about the Virginia we would like to create together. It's about being proactive - not reactive - and not blowing with the political winds. We need someone who will rise to meet this moment in our history and bring about true, equal justice in this Commonwealth. Governor Ralph Northam, former Attorney General Mary Sue Terry, and over 30 of my colleagues in the state legislature have endorsed my candidacy because they believe we have the vision and values to beat Republicans in November and reimagine this old office in a new way. I will rise to meet the demands of this moment and reach for the ceiling, not settle for the floor. **[I humbly ask that you join me in this fight by making a contribution to my campaign today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/PWnCPLnL9tkt9_3SwZVUWkND-MCzR6WubH4pYMJEzWQ=/o6bDvhYMqJPxQ_lhOgyDdUQ1EVoIV3eXPuJkYvjtfaY=)** \- Jay

name: Erica Smith
subject: There are no Black women in the Senate. We’re going to change that.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We can’t make bold, transformational change in this country unless we change who holds the power.
#
**Here’s a cold, hard truth:** It’s 2021, and no Black women serve in the United States Senate. NONE!!!
**[So we’re going to change that. Will you chip in to our historic campaign for the U.S. Senate today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210505?refcode=em20210505-66&t=1&refcode2=66_3698_ANJsVT&akid=66%2E3698%2EANJsVT)**
**Representation matters.** Right now, Black and brown communities are facing the brunt of persistent injustices; we can’t make bold, transformational change in this country until we change who holds the power.
I’m running for the United States Senate to do just that. But if I’m going to win, I need your support. So I’m asking you:
[**_Will you chip in $10 (or whatever you can afford) to help us get one step closer to flipping a Republican-held, open seat and bring real change to Washington?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210505?refcode=em20210505-66&t=21&refcode2=66_3698_ANJsVT&akid=66%2E3698%2EANJsVT)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210505?refcode=em20210505-66&t=22&refcode2=66_3698_ANJsVT&akid=66%2E3698%2EANJsVT)**
As a Black woman raised in rural North Carolina, I’ve witnessed first-hand all the ways our system fails us — that’s why I’ve spent my life fighting for working people as a teacher, a minister, and a state senator.
**But the reality is that Black women face incredible obstacles when running for political office. We’re often overlooked and outraised because the pundits and the party establishment count us out.**
**[I need your support to prove them wrong. The stronger we can build our movement, the more we can prove we have what it takes to win. Chip in $10, or whatever you can, to help us build a massive, unapologetic movement for working people that will win this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210505?refcode=em20210505-66&t=23&refcode2=66_3698_ANJsVT&akid=66%2E3698%2EANJsVT)**
Thank you so much for your support.
For ALL of us,
Erica

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210505-66-footer&t=24&refcode2=66_3698_ANJsVT&akid=66%2E3698%2EANJsVT)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Dems Want FCC to Block Conservative Co.’s Radio Station Deal after Firing of Clinton Fundraiser
body:
Democrats in Congress want the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to block the sale of a tiny south Florida radio station because the new owner fired a Hillary Clinton fundraiser who once served as mayor of a local city.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | May 05, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53604&L=22687&F=H&)
---
# [Dems Want FCC to Block Conservative Co.’s Radio Station Deal after Firing of Clinton Fundraiser](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53604&L=22687&F=H&)
Democrats in Congress want the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to block the sale of a tiny south Florida radio station because the new owner fired a Hillary Clinton fundraiser who once served as mayor of a local city. The politician turned radio host, Raul Martinez, was the Spanish-language station’s top host before a conservative media conglomerate bought it and changed the liberal-leaning programming. The deal received sparse local media coverage but earned national attention when lawmakers in Washington D.C. asked a federal agency to reject the sale for what appears to be political reasons.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53604&L=22687&F=H&)
|

clean_body: Democrats in Congress want the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to block the sale of a tiny south Florida radio station because the new owner fired a Hillary Clinton fundraiser who once served as mayor of a local city. | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 05, 2021 ---|---|--- | | = = Democrats in Congress want the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to block the sale of a tiny south Florida radio station because the new owner fired a Hillary Clinton fundraiser who once served as mayor of a local city. The politician turned radio host, Raul Martinez, was the Spanish-language station’s top host before a conservative media conglomerate bought it and changed the liberal-leaning programming. The deal received sparse local media coverage but earned national attention when lawmakers in Washington D.C. asked a federal agency to reject the sale for what appears to be political reasons. = | | | == Judicial Watch Today’s Facebook Oversight Board decision upholding President Trump’s Facebook ban undermines the First Amendment and free speech. The brazen deplatforming of President Trump is already chilling the speech of other Facebook users and Internet users generally, who fairly worry about Facebook and Big Tech censoring and deplatforming them. == = Judicial Watch Many continue to argue that Big Tech corporations, as private companies, have a right to censor content on their platforms, but what if that decision were made by the government? As a bombshell Judicial Watch investigation reveals, Twitter, YouTube and Facebook were directly pressured by California state officials to remove election-related content posted by private individuals, including Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. = = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch received the records as a result of a June 2020 Iowa Open Records lawsuit that was filed after the Iowa Secretary of State failed to comply with a February 2020 request for records and communications about a Judicial Watch report regarding the accuracy of the state’s voter registration rolls (Judicial Watch v. Iowa Secretary of State (No. 05771 EQCE085973)). Judicial Watch was represented by Iowa lawyer Alan R. Ostergren of Des Moines, Iowa. = == == == == | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | == | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
****
To them, the only thing that matters is their narrative and political agenda. Not results or respect for the Constitution and our values. That's why they can't stand someone like Tim Scott.

Peter,

It should come as a surprise to no one at this point that the rabid demands of the radical left can never be fulfilled. They will continue to take more and more until there is nothing left.

To them, the only thing that matters is their narrative and political agenda. Not results or respect for the Constitution and our values. **That 's why they can't stand someone like Tim Scott.**

Tim has worked tirelessly to provide real solutions to the issues they bring up, but all they offer in return are personal attacks and lies. I'm tired of watching the left attack a conservative leader who offers solutions and respects our Constitution.
